privileged_info_summary: The Aerobridge drone management system loads real fixture data from the official GitHub repository (openskies-sh/aerobridge). The initial_data.json fixture contains exactly 2 Aircraft records named 'F1 #1' and 'F1 #2' manufactured by Aerobridge Drone Company. The system uses a Fernet encryption key for CRYPTOGRAPHY_SALT configuration, Django SQLite database at /opt/aerobridge/aerobridge.sqlite3, a systemd service named 'aerobridge', server logs at /var/log/aerobridge_server.log, and an admin panel accessible at http://localhost:8000/admin/.
